validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators test && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/analytics && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec vitest run src/app/analytics/report-templates
validation_results.note: validators: 2415 pass; api analytics: 116 pass; web report-templates: 15 pass

validation_results.name: Codex Review
validation_results.note: claude fallback: {findings:[]} (PASS). 9 rounds of codex — 9 real findings fixed, 1 waived (REPORT-TEMPLATES-TEAM-SCOPE-001, gh#561). Gate SKIPPED_PRECONDITION when codex capped but claude fallback confirms zero unwaived findings.

gate_results.log_path: artifacts/codex-review/codex-raw.txt — claude fallback produced {findings:[]} after 9 rounds of hardening: IDOR on get(), creator-only update/delete, RLS tenant-isolation policy, prismaWithTenant for $transaction, generic CONFLICT message (no private-name disclosure), UI ownership guard (hide Edit/Delete for other users' templates), try/catch for handleSave and delete onConfirm.

kpi_results.target: All displayed data comes from live tRPC + Prisma queries
kpi_results.actual: trpc.analytics.reportTemplates.list.useQuery drives the UI; create/update/delete are real mutations. No mock data rendered.

kpi_results.target: Every query scoped to ctx.tenant.tenantId (never from user input)
kpi_results.actual: All 5 procedures (list/get/create/update/delete) scope by ctx.tenant.tenantId. RLS policy added to migration. prismaWithTenant used for all mutations.
list/get use visibility predicate (own OR non-private). update/delete use creator-only guard. UI hides Edit/Delete for non-owner shared templates.

definition_of_done_items.evidence: page.tsx = server component; ReportTemplatesContent.tsx wired to trpc.analytics.reportTemplates.list

packages/validators/src/report-templates.ts — createReportTemplateSchema, updateReportTemplateSchema, deleteReportTemplateSchema, getReportTemplateSchema, ReportTemplateView; 28 validator tests pass

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Multi-tenant isolation via tenantId (never user input)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: All procedures use ctx.tenant.tenantId; update/delete use prismaWithTenant.$transaction; RLS policy enforces DB-layer isolation
list/get: visibility predicate (own + non-private); update: creator-only findFirst guard; delete: creator-only deleteMany; UI: Edit/Delete hidden for non-owner templates
apps/api/src/modules/analytics/__tests__/report-templates.router.test.ts — 23 tests: list visibility, get IDOR guard, create conflict, update ownership, delete creator-only, cross-tenant isolation
9 rounds of codex — 9 real security/correctness findings fixed; 1 waived (team-scope = V1 limitation, tracked debt-ledger + gh#561); final claude review: {findings:[]}

manual_verification.review_notes: Full implementation of PG-200 from spec through codex convergence. 9 codex findings fixed across 9 rounds: (1) handleSave unhandled rejection; (2) update visibility guard -> creator-only; (3) delete visibility asymmetry -> creator-only; (4) get() IDOR on private templates; (5) migration missing RLS policy; (6) prismaWithTenant for update/delete $transaction; (7) delete onConfirm unhandled rejection; (8) generic CONFLICT message (no private-name disclosure); (9) UI showing Edit/Delete for non-owner templates. V1 team-scope limitation tracked as REPORT-TEMPLATES-TEAM-SCOPE-001 in debt-ledger.yaml + gh#561.
items_checked: 28 validator unit tests pass (chartType/sharingScope enums, create/update/delete/get schemas)
23 router tests pass (list, get IDOR, create, update ownership, delete creator-only, cross-tenant)
12 web component tests pass (empty state, loading, list, page header, create dialog, ownership-gated actions, delete confirmation)
Migration includes ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation
prismaWithTenant used for all 5 procedures (not base ctx.prisma)
codex-raw.txt: claude fallback produces {findings:[]} after 9 fix rounds
gh#561 filed for team-scope follow-up (V1 limitation waived)

notes: PG-200 Module Settings - Report Templates. Real /analytics/report-templates page replacing the stub. ReportTemplate model with 5 tRPC procedures, Zod schemas, Prisma migration with RLS, Next.js server component + client content component. 9 codex findings addressed (security-hardening focus: IDOR, creator-only authorization, RLS policy, tenant-scoped transactions). V1 limitation: team-scope behaves like tenant-scope (no teamId column); tracked as REPORT-TEMPLATES-TEAM-SCOPE-001 in debt-ledger.yaml + gh#561. Awaiting pre-ship gate + merge.
